Text: After watching this course, you will learn the technologies used in making websites from start to end And making successful and profitable websites, I will teach you in this course end to end All these videos will be uploaded free of cost on my channel Code with Harry And I will add all the videos in a playlist, which I would like you to access from the description And bookmark it so that you don't miss any video This course is for those people who don't know anything Yes, those people who don't know anything about web development and want to start Maybe you haven't heard anything about programming This course is for those people, I will teach you from start to end Before starting this course, I would like to request you to like this video And along with that, tell me in the comment below where are you from And you join this course, write to me so that in the coming time I will have to give anything related to the course Like notes or cheat sheets or maybe there are some resources that I should share with you So I will reply to all those things in your comment So if you haven't commented below yet, then it is very important to comment your name and where you are from Those people who are already making websites and those who are working in HTML, JavaScript and CSS I would like to tell those people that you should also watch this course At the start, you may feel that you know some things But after 2-3-4 videos, I will progress it at an advanced level And there you will get some best practices, some common mistakes that people should use Some new tools that people don't use at all, they use old techniques Pointing out all those things, I will take you forward I will teach you HTML, CSS and JavaScript in this course So you must join this course And I want to assure you that after watching this course, you will be able to make any kind of professional website I get a lot of questions like this Some people say that there is an element that is not going to the left, it floats to the right There is no border of anything Sometimes someone says that the element is coming up and down, it is not coming in a line Sometimes you want up and down, it is coming in a line Sometimes you want 4 elements in a row, but the fifth element is coming down Such problems are faced a lot And the only source for this is that you don't have an understanding of CSS So I am going to build up the same understanding through this course And I will tell you how you will never have to face this problem in your life So you must join this course, stay with me And we will start this course soon First of all, we will discuss how a website works What is the role of CSS, HTML and JavaScript in a website And after that, we will take it forward And I will take you forward and explain to you how you can make a successful website We will build up, install IDE, we will do everything in this course Just stay with me in this video Alright guys, so now we will see what is HTML, CSS and JavaScript here And how websites work If you have listened to me carefully, then after today you will never have a problem in understanding How HTML, CSS and JavaScript work to serve a website Now if you have come here, are watching this course And if you want to learn how to make a website, then you must know that HTML is necessary to make any website If you want to make a website, then it is a must, without it, the work will not work But both of them are equally important And what do CSS and JavaScript do? CSS adds beauty and JavaScript adds brain So our website becomes beauty with brain Now you will say, what are you saying, beauty with brain So I will explain this very soon So here I write brain And this is our beauty That is, HTML is a must This is a body If there is no body, then how will the work work Then after that, beauty means clothes, makeup, all those things are our CSS Then JavaScript is brain, that is, what does your website do Did not understand, no problem, we are going to see a very good analogy Here we are going to see an analogy of a car You are seeing this car, it is a very powerful car And what is this car That it has a body So when it was made So first of all it will have a metallic body I will write here metallic body That is, its body That is, whatever metal it is made of, only that will stand And nothing will happen inside it Because as a first step it must have been made, its face must have been made Its iron must have been made The glass on top of it, the pieces on it must have been made Without thinking what design to give to its wheels What color to do in its wheels Along with that, the design that we have here The design that we have here How much big headlight to keep, how much to make round How far to keep it from the glass All those things come in designing First of all, its body must have been made A piece of metal must have been made And after that To add beauty to it Color and all So number 2 comes Beauty, meaning color And after that your design Your designs are made, which are cut here So I write designs here And along with that Here is your wheel In this The design is made in this way External metal is put here Whatever is put here Alloy wheels are given here All those things come here And I write decors here That is, the decoration is put here So that it looks better After that comes the brain Meaning engine So what does the engine do here Engine brain works Now the engine along with Along with accelerator, brake and clutch That is, all these things What do they do They tell a website How to run So they tell a car How to run Exactly the same way The website has a metallic body And this design is my color This is my CSS So here I write CSS And after that Here is my engine My JavaScript So I hope you liked the analogy You must have understood How HTML, CSS and JavaScript Contribute But just understanding this thing Is not enough How in a website HTML, CSS and JavaScript role is played Here I would like to tell you How does a website work Now see what is here You are seeing a web server And this diagram may seem a little scary to beginners This is a web server This is a computer This is you, this is you, this is the client So what did the client do The client has his Ubuntu, Windows This is the operating system In that computer he sent a request That request can be seen like this www.codewithhari.com www.codewithhari.com www.codewithhari.com www.codewithhari.com He said Give me codewithhari.com Now what is Codewithhari.com is on the server of codewithhari Or any website Google.com is on the server of Google Which has its own IP address So this server has its own IP address And on this IP address This website is standing It has its files, its backend is kept Now the backend can be in anything Backend can be in PHP I don't want to confuse you too much Backend can be in Python Backend can be in Python Backend can be in NodeJS And I will not expect from you You know what all this is You may not have heard their name You have to understand that I have written Some names of backend and what they do This backend does some processing Some computations And what is the result of computation The result of computation is HTML, CSS, JavaScript Now this HTML is the main body Inside this CSS and JavaScript is kept inside this How it is kept, we will talk later But consider an envelope Consider HTML as a body And inside this envelope This body is wrapped With CSS and JavaScript A bundle is sent Whose body is HTML And inside this body is CSS and JavaScript This body is sent as a response What is the response of the request CodeWithHarry.com The response of this request Your server gave Take these three things So this response is given by your web server Like you go to the restaurant to eat There you say Give me a paneer butter masala What is the response The response is Take paneer butter masala And if you order roti, you get it It comes on your table But if you had said aloo gobi Then you would have got something else You would not have got paneer butter masala Similarly if you CodeWithHarry.com slash something else Like I wrote codewithharry.com slash about So maybe I get another page I wrote codewithharry.com slash contact So maybe I get another page So this is the request Now which restaurant you are requesting It is a domain This is a domain I am requesting from this website CodeWithHarry.com And it can be empty It is possible that you go to a restaurant And you say bring some food So whatever he feeds by default, he will bring it Just an analogy I just want to explain to you If you put codewithharry.com Then the home page will come If you put slash about, then the about page will come If you put slash contact, then the contact page will come Obviously if it exists If it does not exist Suppose you go to a restaurant You say give me Chinese noodles He does not make Chinese noodles So how will he feed you He will say sir not available So the way to say not available is Server says 404 Server sends a response Client and server Communicate with each other Client sends a request to the server And the server does some processing Using any one of these programming languages Using any one backend He prepares To send a frontend To whom To the client So what does the backend do? It prepares these three things And what does he do? He sends this thing To him To the client So I hope you understood How this website works I will tell you one more time There was a computer here The client who has this computer He said codewithharry.com Server did processing In my case I am using python That too on my server Processing was done through python It generated three things Where CSS and JavaScript Was present inside the HTML This computer Now what will happen When this computer will get HTML, CSS and JavaScript This is a program called web browser It is installed in the computer You will also have What does this web browser do? This document This is a document HTML, CSS and JavaScript is a text By manipulating it It shows you what you will see If you open codewithharry.com You will see a website Where will it come All those things The job of the browser is to display And what does the browser receive? This document receives HTML, CSS and JavaScript So this is our basic working website So let's move ahead and see What is the role of HTML Although we have already discussed Let's understand the role of HTML, CSS and JavaScript And after that we will start coding Let's talk about HTML HTML has a full form Hypertext Markup Language And this is a standard Many people have agreed Will use HTML To make a website Everyone use HTML And all the browsers who make Will also display this So it has made a standard This is a well standardized system And as I told you This is a standard markup language This means that all people Will use this And Web browsers will also Adhere to this HTML is only a body If I talk about a human Then only skeleton Only skeleton with bones So if we talk about a skeleton My drawing is not so good But you just understand here This is a skeleton I have not made a very good skeleton But HTML is a skeleton And here These bones will be of a skeleton And this rib cage Anyway, I will leave it This skeleton This is only the face of the website Which is represented by HTML Now if I move forward I come inside CSS So what does CSS do? It gives a design to this skeleton The skeleton we have The skin, the color of the skin, the hair Clothes Because of which people look good That is our CSS Now what is padding style sheets? It is a style sheet language Which is of your web page That is, the HTML body you made It makes its presentation good What color should be of which element? What background color should be of which element? Which element will float in the left? Which element will go to the top? Which element will keep how much distance inside itself? How much margin will keep? How much padding will keep? What will be the color of its border? All these things are decided by CSS And we will see how to use it in the future And this makes our website Beautiful and modern looking So all the animations and all these things You see, with the help of CSS You can achieve Now let's come quickly to JavaScript Without wasting much time And JavaScript is brain That is, the brain of your website The brain The ability to think That is called JavaScript Like a human being If he is taking wise decisions Then he is able to take wise decisions Because of JavaScript So let's say a person is saying Let's go there So he is able to think That is JavaScript Now I have told you in human terms HTML and CSS HTML is the body and CSS is its design Its looks are that JavaScript is its brain Where to go, when to go, how to go All those things are the way it decides Okay Now what we will do here We will learn JavaScript properly And I want to tell you in JavaScript If you will enter into JavaScript It is a big language and you will find it difficult So I will suggest you That as you are going into HTML, CSS, JavaScript If you have learned HTML It is not that you have to learn HTML 100% I will complete this point now Don't listen to half of my talk And JavaScript Suppose you have learned HTML If you have learned HTML 80% Then that is enough If you have learned CSS 40-60% Then that is enough I am talking about beginners And if you have learned JavaScript 50-70% Then that is enough And the rest of the things you will learn You will learn from your practice You will learn by making websites Never do this The biggest mistake that beginners do You have taken HTML and wasted 1.5 years You have taken CSS You have started remembering all the properties And you have not even touched JavaScript You don't even know what is in the pocket of JavaScript And what happens in it How all these things work You don't know the spelling of JavaScript You don't have to do this If you do this, you will lose a lot of time And you will not be able to relate How to use these three together If you want to relate And want to understand things properly Then you have to read these three simultaneously And learn by making websites And that is what I am going to teach you through this course So this JavaScript It is a high level dynamic interpreted programming language And I will tell you the meaning of dynamic later Now leave it And this is a client side scripting language This is very important JavaScript can be used on the server side But this is a client side programming language So if I come to this diagram So the programming inside the browser Like if you click on it If I click on the mouse If I hover the mouse So what happens And all these things can be written through JavaScript If I click on any element A new window opens If I click on any element A form is submitted All these things are achieved through JavaScript So you can write logic You can convert kilometers to miles You can convert kilograms to grams You can do all these things with the help of JavaScript And your HTML tags You can change the data inside it We will see how to do all these things And here Your client side scripting It helps in doing JavaScript I hope you understood HTML, CSS and JavaScript In web development And this video was An introductory video Many people must be thinking that this was basic And many of you must know these things But very soon I want to take it to the advanced level I will tell you How websites are made And those who know They will also know What practices they should use So stay with me in this video
